title: Karma Shader Cartoon Style
description: A hand-crafted cel-shaded Minecraft shaderpack that turns the world into a playable animated film. Features distinctive toon lighting bands, sharp ink outlines, painted skies, animated water foam, and custom dimension overhauls.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02f90d15903a008137c8a7ec8a6dba88e1712d82.png)
# Karma Cartoon Shader

**Karma Cartoon Shader** is a hand-crafted, cel-shaded shaderpack that transforms Minecraft into a playable animated film. Designed to be both visually striking and lightweight, it replaces realistic rendering with clean, stylized art lines and vibrant, flat-painted colors—all while keeping your performance smooth.

---


*  **Cel-Shaded Lighting:** Sunlight, shadows, and block light are quantized into clean, distinctive toon bands.
*  **Ink Outlines:** Intelligent edge detection draws a sharp, scene-tinted outline around blocks and silhouettes (excludes your hand/held items).
*  **Toon Water:** Flat-painted water colors with an animated white foam line tracing the shores and a single hard, painted sun gleam.
*  **Painted Skies:** Custom smooth backdrop gradients, a crisp sun disc with halo rings, and flat-shaded volumetric voxel clouds.
*  **Nether (Crimson Cartoon):** Features a flat crimson vault, a giant breathing lava orb with drawn rings, and ink-rimmed smoke clouds.
*  **The End (Violet Void):** A swirling galaxy crown rotating overhead, hard aurora ribbons, and a drawn window portal into the void.

---

## ⚙️ In-Game Customization

You can easily adjust the cartoon aesthetics directly from the shader settings screen:
* **Toon Bands:** Toggle between 2, 3, or 4 levels of light banding.
* **Outline Strength & Thickness:** Customize or turn off the ink lines.
* **Posterization:** Flatten screen luminance values for a cleaner "flat-paint" look.
